name: Peking Duck
description: Crispy roast duck served with thin pancakes, spring onions, and sweet bean sauce.

name: Sushi Platter
description: Assorted nigiri and maki rolls with fresh salmon, tuna, and shrimp.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic pizza with San Marzano tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, and basil.

name: Tom Yum Goong
description: Spicy and sour shrimp soup with lemongrass, galangal, and lime leaves.

name: Matcha Layer Cake
description: Delicate layered sponge cake with premium matcha cream and a dusting of green tea powder.

name: Pad Thai
description: Stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, tofu, peanuts, bean sprouts, and tamarind sauce.

name: Croissant
description: Buttery, flaky viennoiserie pastry made with layered yeast-leavened dough.

name: Tacos al Pastor
description: Corn tortillas filled with spit-grilled pork, pineapple, onion, and cilantro.

name: Bibimbap
description: Mixed rice bowl with sautéed vegetables, gochujang paste, and a fried egg on top.

name: Gelato
description: Rich and creamy Italian-style ice cream made with fresh milk, sugar, and natural flavors.

name: Pho Bo
description: Vietnamese beef noodle soup with rich bone broth, rice noodles, rare beef slices, and fresh herbs.

name: Fish and Chips
description: Golden-battered cod served with thick-cut chips, mushy peas, and tartar sauce.

name: Shawarma Wrap
description: Thinly sliced marinated meat wrapped in pita with garlic sauce, pickles, and fresh vegetables.

name: Dim Sum Platter
description: Assorted steamed dumplings including har gow, siu mai, and xiao long bao with vinegar dipping sauce.

name: Poutine
description: Crispy fries topped with fresh cheese curds and rich brown gravy.

name: Paella Valenciana
description: Saffron-infused rice with chicken, rabbit, green beans, and snails cooked in a wide shallow pan.

name: Hamburger Classic
description: Juicy beef patty with lettuce, tomato, pickles, cheese, and special sauce on a toasted brioche bun.

name: Miso Ramen
description: Rich miso-based pork broth with curly noodles, chashu pork, corn, butter, and green onions.

name: Falafel Plate
description: Crispy chickpea fritters served with hummus, tahini, Israeli salad, and warm pita bread.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Tender chicken pieces in a creamy spiced tomato sauce, served with basmati rice and naan bread.

name: Ceviche
description: Fresh raw fish marinated in citrus juices with onion, chili, and cilantro.

name: Bratwurst Plate
description: Grilled German sausage served with sauerkraut, mustard, and a soft pretzel.

name: Nasi Goreng
description: Indonesian fried rice with kecap manis, shrimp paste, chicken, and a sunny-side-up egg.

name: Baklava
description: Layers of flaky filo pastry filled with chopped nuts and sweetened with honey syrup.

name: Goulash
description: Hearty beef stew with paprika, onions, and peppers, served with crusty bread.

name: Kimchi Jjigae
description: Spicy and savory kimchi stew with pork belly, tofu, and green onions bubbling in a stone pot.

name: Fish Tacos
description: Lightly battered white fish in corn tortillas with shredded cabbage, pico de gallo, and crema.

name: Moussaka
description: Layered casserole of eggplant, spiced ground lamb, and creamy béchamel sauce baked until golden.

name: Laksa
description: Spicy coconut noodle soup with prawns, fish cakes, bean sprouts, and a rich curry broth.

name: Churros
description: Crispy fried dough sticks coated in cinnamon sugar, served with thick hot chocolate dipping sauce.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Mildly spiced creamy tomato-based chicken curry finished with butter and fenugreek leaves.

name: Okonomiyaki
description: Savory Japanese pancake filled with cabbage, pork belly, and topped with okonomi sauce, mayo, and bonito flakes.

name: Bobotie
description: Spiced minced meat baked with an egg-based topping, served with yellow rice and chutney.

name: Wonton Soup
description: Delicate pork and shrimp wontons swimming in a clear savory broth with leafy greens.

name: Crème Brûlée
description: Rich vanilla custard topped with a layer of caramelized sugar, cracked with a spoon before eating.

name: Som Tam
description: Spicy green papaya salad with cherry tomatoes, peanuts, dried shrimp, and a tangy lime dressing.

name: BBQ Ribs
description: Slow-smoked pork ribs with a sticky sweet-and-tangy barbecue sauce, falling off the bone.

name: Bánh Mì
description: Vietnamese baguette sandwich filled with grilled pork, pickled daikon, cucumber, cilantro, and pâté.

name: Pierogi
description: Soft dumplings stuffed with potato and cheese, boiled and pan-fried with butter and onions.

name: Feijoada
description: Hearty black bean stew with various cuts of pork and beef, served with rice, collard greens, and orange slices.

name: Hainanese Chicken Rice
description: Poached chicken with fragrant rice cooked in chicken fat, served with chili sauce and ginger paste.

name: Mole Poblano
description: Complex sauce made with chocolate, chilies, nuts, and spices, served over tender turkey.

name: Tarte Tatin
description: Upside-down caramelized apple tart with buttery puff pastry, served warm with crème fraîche.

name: Jollof Rice
description: Vibrant one-pot rice dish cooked with tomatoes, peppers, onions, and aromatic spices.

name: Schnitzel
description: Thin breaded and pan-fried veal cutlet served with lemon wedge and potato salad.

name: Kebabs
description: Grilled marinated meat skewers served with grilled vegetables, flatbread, and yogurt sauce.

name: Tiramisu
description: Layered coffee-soaked ladyfingers with mascarpone cream and a dusting of cocoa powder.

name: Green Curry
description: Aromatic green curry with chicken, bamboo shoots, Thai basil, and coconut milk.

name: Peking Ravioli
description: Pan-fried pork dumplings with a crispy bottom and juicy filling, served with black vinegar dipping sauce.

name: Chocolate Fondant
description: Warm chocolate cake with a gooey molten center, served with vanilla ice cream and fresh berries.
